title: leucanthemum visianii
intro: Leucanthemum visianii, also known as the Illyrian daisy, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family that is native to the Balkan Peninsula and parts of Eastern Europe. The medicinal properties of Leucanthemum visianii include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Leucanthemum visianii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
